_notes: Every phrase here must be voiced/reviewed by a native Pidgin speaker before recording TTS audio. {placeholders} are filled dynamically by the backend.
sale_recorded: Oga you don sell {item} for {amount}. Today total na {today_total}, profit na {today_profit}.
low_stock_alert: Oga, {item} dey finish — only {quantity} remain. Time to restock.
expense_recorded: OK, I don record {amount} wey you spend on {category}.
kolo_deposit_no_goal: Sharp! You don save {amount}. Your Kolo balance na {saved_amount} now.
kolo_deposit_with_goal: Sharp! You don save {amount} for {goal_name}. You don reach {saved_amount} out of {target_amount}. {remaining} remain.
kolo_balance: Your Kolo balance na {saved_amount}. Continue to save small small.
kolo_goal_reached: Oga congratulations! You don reach your target for {goal_name}!
debt_query_empty: Nobody owe you for now. Your book clean.
debt_query_list: People wey owe you: {list}. Total na {total}.
debt_recorded: OK, I don record say {customer_name} owe you {amount}. I go remind dem.
debt_reminder_to_customer: Good day, this na reminder say you owe {amount} for {business_name}. Abeg settle when you fit.
stock_query_empty: You never add any stock yet.
restock_recorded: OK, I don add {quantity} {item} to your stock.
restock_due_soon: Based on how you dey sell, your {item} go finish by {predicted_date}. Restock by {restock_by_date}.
daily_summary: Today, you sell {sales_count} time, total na {today_total}, profit na {today_profit}. You dey go!
overspending_warning: Oga at this rate, your money go finish in {days_left} days. Slow down small.
end_of_day_cash_question_1: How much cash you count for hand?
end_of_day_mismatch: Oga, something no add up — {difference} dey missing. Check again.
end_of_day_balanced: Everything balance well. Your money correct.
apprentice_sale_alert_to_boss: {apprentice_name} just record a sale of {amount} for {item}.
apprentice_suspicious_alert: Oga, suspicious activity for your shop. Check the photo evidence wey I send you.
price_below_cost_warning: No do am! That price go put you for loss. Your minimum price na {min_price}.
unknown_input: I no understand wetin you talk. Try say "I sell rice for 5000" or "I save 1000".
welcome_first_time: Welcome to BUYNA! I go help you track your sales, your stock and your money — for Pidgin, anytime, even without network.
